todaysResult.headline: Bed bug activity was very low today.
todaysResult.body: We treated the mattress and box spring, treated the bed frame and placed interceptors under bed legs today. A follow-up visit in 10–14 days is recommended to stay ahead of newly hatching activity. Wash and dry bedding on high heat.
todaysResult.nextStep: A follow-up visit in 10–14 days is recommended to stay ahead of newly hatching activity. Wash and dry bedding on high heat.
